results.summary: Blocking fixed: overlay-only path (OverlaySource set, Source empty) now writes overlay content as CLAUDE.local.md and calls CheckGitignore. Advisory: separator logic assumes base content ends with a newline; content without trailing newline produces no blank-line separator (acceptable for the common case).

Implementation fits the existing architecture cleanly. Advisory 1: InstallRepoContent re-reads the written file for overlay append rather than reusing in-memory bytes. Advisory 2: CheckGitignore called from both InstallRepoContent and SettingsMaterializer — can produce duplicate warnings per repo per apply.

Blocking fixed: (1) overlay-only path now implemented with tests; (2) legacy Content: field in two tests updated to canonical Claude.Content. Advisory: overlayDir parameter contract could benefit from a stronger godoc comment on call site; CheckGitignore duplicate-warning potential.
